text: The clutch exercise is one of the simplest and easiest exercises to complete and get a high score on on the simulator. When one of the green globes lights up, you will be required to touch that globe with the correct hand. The middle to furthest globes will be out of your reach and therefore will require you to clutch in order to use your instrument to touch them. Subsequently, you will need to clutch in the opposite direction as you come back to touch the closest globes to your field of view. Using your camera will actually disqualify you from this exercise. Once you feel comfortable using the clutch mechanism on the hand controls, this exercise is easy to master.
